name: Memory system development
purpose: meta-branch: work on the memory system itself, separate from product features

children.name: Landscape of similar approaches
children.purpose: external work moving in similar direction: typed knowledge graphs, hierarchical memory, lazy context loading

children.name: Purpose discipline
children.purpose: rules and accumulated practice for writing good `purpose` fields in this project

children.name: Scaling reference
children.purpose: reference for what to do as memory grows: staleness, duplicates, hidden content. revisit when memory has 30+ nodes or after 2026-08-31

children.name: Memory readability tests
children.purpose: log of probes from fresh LLM sessions; surfaces gaps in the README/memory pointers

children.name: Memory queue
children.purpose: deferred work on the memory system itself (extensions, refinements)
